channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 NuvioMedia/NuvioDesktop (826 ⭐)

]]>

item.title: 📝 skydoves/compose-nav-graph (478 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: skydoves

📝 Repository: skydoves/compose-nav-graph

📄 Descrizione: ⛵️ Compose Navigation Graph plugin for Android Studio that visualizes your entire app flow as an interactive map of rendered previews, typed arguments, and transitions.

⭐ Stelle: 478

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android compose compose-multiplatform jetpack-compose jetpack-navigation kmp kotlin-multiplatform navigation navigation3 skydoves

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T11:12:07Z

item.title: 📝 IRNova/NovaRadar (178 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/NovaRadar

📄 Descrizione: Nova Radar is a desktop IP scanner built with Go + React. It scans Cloudflare IP ranges from multiple selectable sources, performs real two-phase verification (TCP + TLS handshake), and outputs working IPs sorted by latency. Built by Nova Proxy Group.

⭐ Stelle: 178

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-31T06:23:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-29T01:40:09Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: zepto-labs

📝 Repository: zepto-labs/react-native-delta

item.title: 📝 cheburnetik/AutoConnector_for_Telegram (60 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cheburnetik

📝 Repository: cheburnetik/AutoConnector_for_Telegram

📄 Descrizione: It automatically finds, verifies, and sets up MTProto proxies for Telegram. The user doesn't have to switch proxies manually. It is 100% automated. //RU: Сам находит, проверяет и поднимает MTProto-прокси для Telegram. Юзер прокси руками не переключает. 100% автоматика.

⭐ Stelle: 60

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android anti-censorship compose-multiplatform kotlin-multiplatform mtproto proxy socks5 telegram

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-01T00:47:13Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-29T10:01:01Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto (50 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ITSDevelopmentCore

📝 Repository: ITSDevelopmentCore/hypervault-crypto

📄 Descrizione: Offline cryptographic core of Hypervault: Argon2id, HKDF, AES-256-GCM, HV1 vault format, BIP-32/39, SLIP-10, air-gapped signing. Pure Kotlin, single dependency (Bouncy Castle).

⭐ Stelle: 50

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm air-gapped argon2id bip32 bip39 cryptography kotlin offline-first password-manager security

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-05T23:22:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-09T05:20:55Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ShubhamJ010/ScreenshotJanitor (41 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ShubhamJ010

📝 Repository: ShubhamJ010/ScreenshotJanitor

📄 Descrizione: Clean up your screenshot clutter automatically. ssJanitor detects new screenshots, lets you archive or delete them from a notification, and sweeps away the rest on schedule. Material 3 Expressive design. No cloud, no fuss, no clutter.

⭐ Stelle: 41

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android-utility digital-declutter file-management gallery-cleaner material-design phone-cleaner photo-organizer productivity-tool screen-capture screenshot-cleaner screenshot-manager screenshot-organizer screenshot-tool storage-manager

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-06T23:57:50Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-04T01:24:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
